title: inga umbellata
intro: Inga umbellata, also known as the Angelim-vermelho, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential antiparasitic and antiviral properties. Inga umbellata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
